title: LLM-Powered Threat Analysis: A New Frontier
summary: How we are using local LLMs (Ollama) to parse unstructured log data into actionable threat intelligence. This approach allows for real-time anomaly detection with zero cloud ingress, ensuring data sovereignty.

title: Bypassing JavaScript Protections with Selenium
summary: A technical deep dive into simulated human browsing for threat intelligence gathering. We bypass JS obfuscation and fingerprinting techniques by orchestrating headless browsers that mimic user interaction patterns.

title: Detection Engineering as Code (DEaC)
summary: Why manual rule creation is dead. Implementing a CI/CD pipeline for Sigma rules, automated testing with Atomic Red Team, and deployment to Elastic SIEM via Terraform.
